description_long: A rustic round loaf of bread sits on a wooden cutting board, dusted generously with white flour. The bread has a thick, rugged crust with deep, irregular cracks and a golden-brown coloration beneath the flour. The loaf has been cut in half, revealing a dense, airy interior with visible air pockets and a slightly off-white crumb. The crust appears crisp and well-baked, while the interior looks soft and moist. The bread rests on a lightly floured wooden board, which adds to its artisanal, homemade appearance. There are no visible brand markings or packaging, emphasizing its fresh, bakery-style presentation.
description: A rustic, flour-dusted round loaf of bread cut in half on a wooden board, showing a thick crust and airy interior.
description_view_0: The front view shows the loaf from the side, highlighting the cracked, flour-dusted crust and the cut edge of the bread.
description_view_1: This view displays the bread from the cut side, clearly revealing the soft, airy crumb and the two separated halves.
description_view_2: The rear side of the loaf is visible, emphasizing the rounded, rugged crust and the flour dusting.
description_view_3: The back view shows both halves from behind, focusing on the rounded crust and the separation between the pieces.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is thick and rugged, with deep, irregular cracks and a heavy dusting of white flour. There are no seeds or decorative scoring, giving it a rustic, artisanal appearance.
